title: Hiring Production Engineer at Netafim India Global Group

jsonLd.title: Hiring Production Engineer at Netafim India Global Group
jsonLd.description:
Netafim India Global Group has an exciting opening for a Production Engineer at our Delhi office. Join a company that values innovation, collaboration, and continuous learning.

About Netafim India Global Group:
Netafim India Global Group is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Monitor equipment performance and coordinate preventive maintenance
• Ensure product quality meets internal and customer specifications
• Manage raw material procurement and inventory levels
• Coordinate with design and engineering teams on product improvements
• Train and supervise shop floor workers and supervisors
• Prepare production cost analysis and efficiency reports
• Manage supplier quality audits and vendor development

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Bachelor's degree in a relevant field
• 1-3 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in APQP
• Proficiency in PPAP
• Proficiency in Statistical Process Control
• Proficiency in ERP Systems
• Proficiency in AutoCAD
• Proficiency in ISO 9001
• Proficiency in Project Management
• Proficiency in Quality Control

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Modern office with recreational facilities
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Annual performance appraisal
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Salary Range: 4 LPA - 9 LPA per annum

Location: Delhi, Delhi, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Netafim India Global Group!

educationRequirements.credentialCategory: Bachelor's degree in a relevant field
